title: infer (aspirational)
manager: Learn a draft machine from production logs — passive automata learning (L*-flavored) over tapes and logs, cleaned up with `minimize`. This is the reverse of everything else: instead of writing a machine and checking its behavior, you observe behavior and derive a candidate machine. Labeled aspirational until the eval bar clears, because inferring a correct machine from examples is genuinely hard, but it completes the ladder — infer learns from behavior, check judges against properties, synth derives from properties.
cs: infer = passive L*-flavored automata learning over tapes/logs -> draft + `minimize` cleanup (W8.18); stays labeled aspirational until the eval bar clears.
